result:
| ID | Title | Priority | Reason |
|----|-------|----------|--------|
| i1 | Empty title creates a blank task | **high** | Validation gap accepting invalid data; affects all clients on every POST. |
| i2 | list_tasks has no pagination | **med** | Real scalability concern, but needs a convention check before design work. |
| i3 | Add SQLite persistence | **med** | Data loss on restart is a real gap, but adding sqlalchemy is a non-trivial dependency decision. |
| i4 | Typo in error message | **low** | Cosmetic copy change in one file; no functional impact. |
| i5 | Marketing newsletter widget | **ignore** | Routed here by mistake; out of scope for the task API. |
